item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-07-08 - Today's Summary
[sudden_breakout] TencentCloud/CubeSandbox (+1340 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +1340，前 3 日均值 196，加速度 6.8x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] addyosmani/agent-skills (+1494 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +1494，前 3 日均值 734，加速度 2x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] dotnet/skills (+261 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C# Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +261，总 stars 4,341，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+736 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +736，总 stars 52,782，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] calesthio/OpenMontage (+801 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +801，总 stars 35,149，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks (+1635 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1635，总 stars 53,182，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] nexu-io/open-design (+444 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: 🎨 The open-source Claude Design alternative. 🖥️ Local-first desktop app. 🖼️ Your coding agent becomes the design engine: prototypes, landing pages, dashboards, slides, images & video — real files, HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export. 🤖 Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Gemini / OpenCode / Qwen & 20+ CLIs via BYOK. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +444，总 stars 76,045，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Installable GitHub library of 1,800+ agentic skills for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Antigravity, and more. Includes specialized plugins, installer CLI, bundles, workflows, and official/community skill collections. item.title: [sudden_breakout] ruvnet/RuView (+1062 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Workflow Automation Description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video. Why it matters: AI Workflow Automation 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +1062，前 3 日均值 431.3，加速度 2.5x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low
